src: Face Recognition on NIST FRVT Top Ranked, Face Liveness Detection Engine on iBeta 2 Certified, 3D Face Anti Spoofing, Face Detection, Face Matching, Face Analysis, Face Sentiment, Face Alignment, Face Identification && Face Verification && Face Representation; Face Reconstruction; Face Tracking; Face Super-Resolution on Android
